text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Rudolf. You know, our uniform's<n>cute and
all...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But I get the feeling that a liiittle<n>tweaking would
make everyone feel<n>even more powerful!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Uniforms are not something that can be<n>changed
on a whim, but... Let's hear it.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Far out! Lemme give you the skinny. ☆

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
There's an item that, when put in<n>clothes, makes
you appear super<n>dignified and waaay cooler
instantly!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Shoulder pads... I believe I've heard of<n>them. The
fact that they can change<n>your silhouette so
drastically is indeed<n>interesting.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I know, right? Strong shoulders are the<n>sign of a
strong person. ☆

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Everyone will look super fresh with their<n>new,
bold shoulders!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Perhaps I will bring this up in the<n>next
student council meeting.
